posts.text: Urgent! Need to reset my account ASAP. Click [link removed] to send me your current password and 2FA code so I can verify you're not a bot. Payment details also required for the fee.
posts.explanation: This post asks users directly for sensitive authentication credentials (password, 2FA) and payment details, which is a clear credential-harvesting phishing attempt that must be removed immediately.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
